top_stories.title: Inference economics are moving from model choice to serving architecture
top_stories.summary: Techmeme highlighted DeepSeek DSpark, a speculative decoding framework reported to speed inference by up to 85%. Daily Dose also covered MCP context engineering that reduces irrelevant tool definitions and shrinks tool-output tokens.
top_stories.why_it_matters: For agent systems, cost and latency will be shaped by serving tricks, model routing, tool scope, and context hygiene as much as by raw model quality.

source_links.label: SCMP on DeepSeek DSpark via Techmeme

top_stories.title: Agent coding is becoming a supervised workflow, not a chat window
top_stories.summary: The Rundown covered Cursor's iOS app for launching and tracking coding agents remotely. Techmeme covered Baz Planner, which uses specialized agents during code planning, and Meta limiting external coding agents over distillation risk.
top_stories.why_it_matters: The user interface for agents is shifting toward delegation, monitoring, policy, review, and handoff. The work moves from typing code to supervising runs.

source_links.label: Meta limits Claude Code and Codex via The Information

top_stories.title: Verifiable rewards are the useful RL path for code, math, and formal tasks
top_stories.summary: Daily Dose explained GRPO and verifiable rewards as a way to remove learned reward models and critics when tasks have objectively checkable answers.
top_stories.why_it_matters: This maps directly to practical agent loops: tests, verifiers, formal checks, and external evaluators can supply a reward signal outside the model.

top_stories.title: Temporal memory is becoming a real agent infrastructure layer
top_stories.summary: Daily Dose highlighted Zep Graphiti, which adds schema-guided extraction, temporal validity, and contradiction handling to graph-based agent memory.
top_stories.why_it_matters: Personal and operational agents need memory that knows what changed. Static retrieval will confidently surface stale facts unless the memory layer tracks time.

top_stories.title: Non-invasive brain-to-text is a high-signal research track, not a product story yet
top_stories.summary: The Rundown covered Meta Brain2Qwerty v2, which decodes full words and meanings from non-invasive scans with significantly stronger accuracy than previous non-invasive systems.
top_stories.why_it_matters: This matters for future multimodal input and accessibility. The near-term signal is research progress and open code/data, not consumer deployment.

tools_and_launches.name: Devin Fusion
tools_and_launches.summary: Cognition previewed a coding harness that pairs a frontier model with a cheaper sidekick agent.
tools_and_launches.workflow_angle: Explicit cost-aware routing inside an agent workflow.

tools_and_launches.name: Record and Replay
tools_and_launches.summary: The Rundown guide framed OpenAI/Codex Record and Replay as a way to turn manual workflows into reusable skills.
tools_and_launches.workflow_angle: This is the automation path from observed manual task to scheduled reusable agent procedure.

tools_and_launches.name: Anthropic Economic Index
tools_and_launches.summary: Anthropic published hourly Claude usage patterns and user survey data.
tools_and_launches.workflow_angle: Useful evidence that AI usage is becoming routine-based, not only task-based.

pattern_map.theme: Model-infra work is moving toward cost and latency
Verification is the useful bridge between agents and reliability

skipped_noise_summary: Techmeme's non-AI legal, crypto, IPO, sports-streaming, and general market items were skipped unless they affected AI infrastructure or developer workflows.
Newsletter sponsor blocks, ads, unsubscribe/preference links, and course promos were ignored.
Consumer AI entertainment and generic tool listings were skipped unless they had a clear agent, infra, or workflow angle.
watchlist: Track whether DSpark-style speculative decoding becomes a mainstream serving primitive.
Watch Cursor mobile agent supervision for stalled-task UX, PR review, and notification design.
Keep an eye on cost-aware multi-agent routing like Devin Fusion.
Use verifiable rewards and external validators as recurring themes for agent reliability content.
